calendar.errorDescription: We could not load the visits calendar. Please try again later.

table.title: VISITS LIST
table.errorDescription: A network problem occurred and we could not retrieve the visits list.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Visit
confirmDialog.body: Are you sure you want to confirm this visit? This action will notify the parties involved.

completeDialog.title: Complete Visit
completeDialog.body: Has the visit already taken place? Marking it as completed will close the scheduling flow for this appointment.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel Visit
cancelDialog.body: Are you sure you want to cancel this visit? This action cannot be undone.

toast.scheduleSuccessDescription: Your visit request has been submitted successfully.
toast.rescheduleSuccessDescription: The appointment has been updated with the new time.
toast.confirmSuccessDescription: The visit status has been successfully updated.
toast.confirmErrorDescription: Could not update the visit status.
toast.completeErrorDescription: Could not mark the visit as completed.
